nasb.text: They will forget their disgrace and all their treachery which they perpetrated against Me, when they live securely on their own land with no one to make them afraid.

esv.text: They shall forget their shame and all the treachery they have practiced against me, when they dwell securely in their land with none to make them afraid,

cnv.text: 他們在自己的土地上安然居住、無人驚嚇的時候，就要擔當自己的羞辱和向我所犯一切不忠的罪；

ccb.text: 当他们在故土安居，没有人来威胁他们的时候，他们就会忘记自己所有的羞辱和得罪我的恶事。
